name: Seam
subtitle: Vintage clothing decision helper
description: Personal iOS app for deciding whether to buy vintage clothing.

apps.name: Seam
apps.subtitle: Vintage clothing buy/skip decisions.
apps.localizedDescription: Compare candidate vintage items against owned items by measurement, price, condition, and duplication risk. Local-first; no auth.
apps.versionDescription:
- Version bump to 0.1.1
- Merge pull request #20 from sugarshin/renovate/react-monorepo
- Merge pull request #19 from sugarshin/renovate/github-actions-digests
- Pin dependency @types/react to 19.1.17
- Pin dependencies
- fix(renovate): migrate deprecated matchPackagePrefixes to matchPackageNames
- Merge pull request #18 from sugarshin/ci/add-build
- ci: add expo export step to catch Metro/codegen failures
- Merge pull request #17 from sugarshin/fix/package-versions
- Fix package versions
- Merge pull request #15 from sugarshin/renovate/react-native-gesture-handler-2.x
- Update renovate config
- Update dependency react-native-gesture-handler to ~2.31.0
- Merge pull request #14 from sugarshin/renovate/react-native-0.x
- Update dependency react-native to v0.85.2
- Merge pull request #13 from sugarshin/renovate/drizzle-orm-0.x
- Update dependency drizzle-orm to ^0.45.0
- Merge pull request #9 from sugarshin/renovate/ruby-3.3.x
- Merge pull request #6 from sugarshin/renovate/pnpm-10.33.x
- Merge pull request #5 from sugarshin/renovate/patch-all-patch-update-dependencies
- Update dependency react-native to v0.81.6
- Merge pull request #4 from sugarshin/renovate/react-monorepo
- chore(release): update source.json for v0.1.0
- Pin dependencies
- Update All minor update devDependencies (#12)
- Merge pull request #3 from sugarshin/renovate/pin-dependencies
- Pin dependencies
- Update dependency ruby to v3.3.11
- Update pnpm to v10.33.2
